visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host in a white cap and black-patterned shirt stands at a shop entrance. He gestures broadly while speaking enthusiastically to the camera. The background shows glass doors and 'Feeling 18' branding in a modern, well-lit urban retail setting. (2) Camera switches to macro close-ups of delicate chocolates. Red heart-shaped and dark round truffles are arranged neatly in display trays. The lighting is crisp, highlighting the smooth textures and vibrant colors of the artisanal confectionery products. (3) The host and a woman in blue lean over the counter, pointing at specific items. They exhibit high-energy expressions, looking closely at the 'Omar Whisky Liquor' labels. The environment is a clean, white-tiled shop interior with professional displays. (4) The host tastes a piece of chocolate and reacts with a highly exaggerated shocked facial expression, eyes wide open. He then breaks down the layers of the chocolate, showing the liquid center to the camera in a close-up shot. (5) Transitions show various other products: large golden-brown croissants being torn to reveal flaky interiors, and several flavors of gelato in metal tubs. A staff member explains the ingredients while the host and companions listen and react. (6) A sequence featuring 'Raw Toast' shows the soft white bread being pulled apart by hands to emphasize its springy texture. Finally, the host stands back in front of the store, giving a summary and pointing to a delivery link.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 夏天就帶你們來吃個冰. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Subtitle]: 然後結束之前 回去前怎麼様. [Variety]: 伴手禮. (3) [Variety]: 好漂亮 這裡跟精品店一樣. (4) [Subtitle]: 梅酒酒心. (5) [Subtitle]: 呷嘿咧 Omar威士忌酒心. (6) [Logo]: Feeling 18. (7) [Subtitle]: 南投酒廠的威士忌. [Slogan]: Omar 威士忌酒心 $85. (8) [Subtitle]: 對 南投酒廠威士忌. (9) [Subtitle]: 好吃對不對. (10) [Subtitle]: 他梅酒裡面還有那個梅子本人. (11) [Subtitle]: 威士忌也好搭哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 你的酒先整個爆出來. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後先有酒香. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後那樣的溫度 再跟巧克力融合起來. (15) [Subtitle]: 好好吃. [Variety]: 好好吃. (16) [Subtitle]: 生巧克力有很多種. (17) [Subtitle]: 他最有名的 75%初戀生巧克力(20入). [Slogan]: $470. (18) [Subtitle]: 有的怕巧克力太苦有沒有. [Slogan]: 第一次購買的首選！. (19) [Subtitle]: 濃度會太高. (20) [Subtitle]: 對 你就選這個是75%的. (21) [Subtitle]: 可可濃度就剛剛好. (22) [Subtitle]: 韓國有那個扁可頌對不對. (23) [Subtitle]: 我們埔里也有厲害的可頌. (24) [Variety]: 巨可頌. (25) [Subtitle]: 很好吃欸. (26) [Subtitle]: 義式冰淇淋Gelato. (27) [Subtitle]: 這是我們的冠軍款 馬告鹽之花. [Slogan]: 馬告鹽之花一比賽冠軍款. (28) [Subtitle]: 它是原住民的山胡椒. (29) [Subtitle]: 搭配頂級的海鹽跟牛奶. (30) [Subtitle]: 它吃起來會有薑跟香茅的味道. (31) [Variety]: (好特別!!!). (32) [Subtitle]: 薑跟香茅的味道. (33) [Subtitle]: 買啦 生吐司啦. [Slogan]: 原味生吐司 $150. (34) [Subtitle]: 怎麼那麼鬆 這麼那麼Q. [Variety]: 超級蓬鬆. (35) [Subtitle]: 有有沒有那麼嫩啊. (36) [Subtitle]: 這個連吐司邊都是嫩的. (37) [Subtitle]: 對啊吐司邊都好吃. (38) [Subtitle]: 而且它可以冷凍保存 你就可以放比較久一點. (39) [Subtitle]: 你現在看到很想吃對不對 但沒時間到南投. (40) [Slogan]: ↓官網下訂直接宅配↓.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 3 female companions appearing in various scenes, 1 male shop staff member.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Asian male with brown hair, wearing a white baseball cap, a black-and-white patterned oversized shirt over a white long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a high-end specialty dessert shop. Features glass display cases for chocolates and gelato, shelves for packaged bread, and a modern clean aesthetic with white tiled walls and branded logos.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narration accompanied by a bright, rhythmic acoustic guitar BGM at approximately 120 BPM. The host's voice is crisp and enunciated, featuring frequent rising pitch contours that signal excitement and enthusiasm to the listener. (2) Every visual transition is punctuated by sharp post-production sound effects like digital pops and comic 'dings.' A second male voice, deeper and more measured, joins to provide professional product descriptions, while the host’s reaction is heard as background 'oohs' and affirmative murmurs. (3) Ambient sounds are minimal, characterized by studio-clean indoor room tone, but incidental noises like the soft rustling of plastic bags and the subtle crunch of food being eaten are clearly audible, adding a sensory layer to the review. (4) The mix is dense with overlapping audio tracks: the continuous upbeat BGM, the fast-paced primary narration, secondary female reactions (laughter and chatter), and stylized SFX. The video concludes with a loud, projected verbal call to action over a swelling musical finale.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Item 1 (Chocolates) -> Item 2 (Croissant) -> Item 3 (Gelato) -> Item 4 (Toast) -> Delivery CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the food products of 'Feeling 18' shop in Nantou through a high-energy, entertaining food review/vlog format, encouraging viewers to visit or order online.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly featuring the store name, showing specific product prices, and providing a delivery CTA at the end.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced influencer-led promotional vlog for a local specialty dessert shop in Puli, Nantou.
